metadata.description: This tests the object key extraction. Breadcrumb should be ['metadata'].

requirements: This tests the array extraction. Breadcrumb should be ['[0]'] within the requirements array.
The system shall log events for auditing.

This string is designed to be exceedingly long to force the chunker to split by size within a JSON array value. Because it exceeds SOFT_MAX_BYTES, the _split_block_if_needed function will step in and slice this text across multiple chunks, nudging the cuts to newlines safely.
